1.name: Flooded Catacombs
1.description: Ancient graves half-drowned in stagnant water.

npcs.name: Silas Redmane
npcs.personality: Serene and unhurried, speaks softly and never wastes words. Has seen too much death to be surprised by anything. Quietly disapproves of unnecessary violence.

npcs.name: Jessa Firebrand
npcs.personality: Gruff, laconic, and proud of their craft. Speaks in short sentences. Distrusts magic and magic-users. Judges adventurers by the quality of their equipment.
